channel.title: Forevergreen
channel.description: We believe in creating a community where sustainability is accessible for everyone. We are building the future of our planet, one tree at a time.

item.title: Why Handmade Gifts Are More Meaningful and Sustainable Than Mass-Produced Ones
item.description: Americans returned over $890 billion worth of gift this year and the average person spends over $1,000 on holiday gifts.
item.dc:creator: Forevergreen

item.title: Fast Fashion and Thrifting: Why Auditing Your Closet Matters
item.description: The average American owns 136 pieces of clothing but only wears 20% of them?That means over 100 pieces are sitting unused, taking up space.
item.dc:creator: Forevergreen

item.title: What is Forevergreen?
item.description: In this blog, we will explain the mission and vision behind Forevergreen.
